creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/bsdinstall/#bsdinstall-part-zfs>

<https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/bsdinstall/#bsdinstall-zfs-vdev_type> the selection is 'stripe'. 

In the next image <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/bsdinstall/#bsdinstall-zfs-disk_select>, the reader might reasonably assume that the two selected disks are to be striped. 

In the next image <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/bsdinstall/#bsdinstall-zfs-vdev_invalid>, suddenly it's not striping. 

Also, there's no white space above the image, as if it's Figure 22. It's not, it's Figure 23. 

This subsection might be improved by better titling of figures. Maybe precede one set of figures with explanatory text.
